caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or conducting an interview. He is wearing a green cap and headphones, suggesting he is engaged in audio work. The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems focused and attentive, possibly listening to someone off-camera or preparing to speak. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional setup for a podcast titled "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logo in the corner of the screen.
